title: salvia nudicaulis var. congesta
intro: Salvia nudicaulis var. congesta, also known as the clustered blue sage or salvia congesta, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its essential oil, which contains salvenol, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of salvia nudicaulis var. congesta include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
